agency: Japan Pension Service office (年金事務所)
nameEn: Pension Enrollment & Contribution Record (issued by Pension Office)
nameJa: 年金事務所発行の「被保険者記録照会回答票」「被保険者記録照会（納付Ⅰ）」「被保険者記録照会（納付Ⅱ）」
noteEn: Request from your nearest pension office (年金事務所) in person or by phone. Alternatives accepted: (a) Nenkin Statement (ねんきん定期便) showing full record history — letter-format only (age 35, 45, 59 birthmonth mailings); (b) Monthly record printout from Nenkin Net including national pension payment history if applicable; (c) National Pension receipts (写し) for the past 2 years. Redact your Basic Pension Number before submitting. Confirm no missed or late payments.
noteJa: 最寄りの年金事務所へ問い合わせ。代替可能：ねんきん定期便（全期間・封書形式のみ）、ねんきんネットの各月記録（国民年金加入期間がある場合は国民年金年金記録も）、国民年金保険料領収証書。基礎年金番号は黒塗りにして提出。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。
